release_notes:
- New: Toast SFTP download — fetch time entries directly from Toast server
- New: Editable preview window with Time In, Time Out, Job, Hours before importing
- New: SSH key management — stored per-restaurant in Firebase, syncs across all computers
- New: Toast SSH Key settings in hamburger menu
- Fix: SFTP CSV format support (In Date/Out Date/Job Title columns)
- Fix: Trackpad and mouse scrolling across the entire app on macOS
- New: Tips-only save — enter tips before employee hours are filled
- New: Tips tab shows all shifts always (Morning, Brunch, Dinner)
